TWN.name: Taiwan
TWN.source: GDP: IMF World Economic Outlook (Oct 2025), 2024 nominal current US$ (Taiwan Province of China; ~US$801.5bn); arrivals: Taiwan Tourism Administration 2023; HDI: DGBAS national calculation (UNDP methodology), 2022 value 0.925; migrants: NIA foreign residents (ARC holders), year-end Dec 2023 (841,627). Population: Taiwan is absent from the World Bank series SP.POP.TOTL; ~23.4 million per Ministry of the Interior household registration statistics (2025).

PRK.name: North Korea
PRK.source: GDP: Bank of Korea, 'GDP Estimates for North Korea in 2024' (published Aug 2025) — nominal (current-price) GDP of 43,678.9 billion won, ~US$31.5bn at BOK's annual-average market exchange rate (the DPRK publishes no official GDP; BOK is the standard external estimator). Arrivals: pre-pandemic (2019) estimate of foreign visitors, ~90% from China. Migrant stock is NOT overridden here — it is supplied automatically by the World Bank series SM.POP.TOTL (PRK is present: 50,439 for 2024). HDI is not overridden and is genuinely unavailable: UNDP/DGBAS publish no composite HDI for North Korea (the HDR file carries component indicators only).

VAT.name: Vatican City
VAT.source: Population: the Holy See is absent from the World Bank series SP.POP.TOTL; ~882 residents (Vatican City State resident population, 2023). GDP: PROXY (Vatican/Holy See has no national-accounts GDP). Holy See 2024 consolidated total operating income of EUR 1.23bn (~US$1.43bn), used as a clearly-labeled revenue proxy for economic output — Secretariat for the Economy, Holy See Consolidated Financial Statements 2024 (published 26 Nov 2025). Arrivals: ~7 million Vatican Museums/tourist visitors, pre-pandemic-recovery level. HDI/migrant stock: not computed by UNDP/World Bank for the Holy See (population ~880, not a UN member state).
